channel.title: PR Primespot – U.S. Breaking News, Politics and Business
channel.description: Stay updated with U.S. breaking news, politics, business, tech, and investigations, with real-time coverage, trusted analysis, and essential daily insights

item.title: Reports Say Mitch McConnell Was Found Unconscious After Emergency Cardiac Incident at DC Home
item.description:
Former Senate Republican leader Mitch McConnell was found unconscious at his Washington, DC home on June 14 following a reported cardiac arrest and was hospitalized after emergency CPR was administered.
Read the full article: https://www.prprimespot.com/politics/mitch-mcconnell-unconscious-cardiac-arrest-dc-home-2026
